title: A Baroque Works Pair Attacks
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on a baroque works pair attacks, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: A Baroque Works Pair Attacks. Usopp and Chopper endure brutal attacks and keep fighting for Luffy, Vivi, and the crew’s promise. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Past here is the royal palace!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Do you realize the situation you're in!?

dialogue.speaker: Miss Merry Christmas
dialogue.text: If you're not involved in the fighting, then you better leave this city as soon as possible!

dialogue.speaker: Lassoo
dialogue.text: Did you hear what I said!?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: This is no place for you to B-

dialogue.speaker: Lassoo
dialogue.text: There's something I need him to do!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: What a kick... to think he could stand up to my Okama Kenpou...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Mooovee outta my way already, Jeez Louise!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: If that's how you wanna play it, then fine! Not a day goes by when I'm not busy honing my Okama Kenpou skills!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: And I'll be damned if some punk thinks he can make my training all for naught!

summary: This part develops a baroque works pair attacks and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
